jsonLd.title: EaseMyTrip is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the EaseMyTrip family as a E-commerce Executive in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About EaseMyTrip:
EaseMyTrip is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EaseMyTrip!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
